title: Anna University Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
shortInfo: Anna University Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 11 May 2026 on the official website of Anna University. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the Anna University Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 11 May 2026 on the official website of Anna University. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the Anna University Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech in Mechanical/Manufacturing/Production, M.E/M.Tech in Design/Product Design & Development Manufacturing /Thermal
qualification.details: Project Associate I: B.E/B.Tech in Mechanical/Manufacturing/Production Project Associate II: M.E/M.Tech in Design/Product Design & Development Manufacturing /Thermal

salary_details.details: Project Associate I: Rs. 20000 Per Month Project Associate II: Rs. 25000 Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Associate posts at Anna University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Project Associate positions at Anna University is June 1, 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate roles?
faq.answer: For Project Associate I, a B.E/B.Tech in Mechanical/Manufacturing/Production is required. For Project Associate II, an M.E/M.Tech in Design/Product Design & Development Manufacturing /Thermal is necessary.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Project Associate positions?
faq.answer: Anna University is recruiting for a total of 3 Project Associate positions. This includes one Project Associate I and two Project Associate II roles.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these Project Associate positions?
faq.answer: The salary for Project Associate I is Rs. 20,000 per month, and for Project Associate II, it is Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Project Associate posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these Project Associate positions.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate roles?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate positions will involve a Written Exam followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Anna University located?
faq.answer: Anna University is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600025.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for contractual positions at Anna University.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Tamil Nadu apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the location as Chennai, Tamil Nadu. While not explicitly stated, it is generally advisable for candidates to check the official notification for any domicile restrictions.
